recommendations: add a modern packaging file (pyproject.toml) and expose clear console_scripts for btrun/tools
add CI (GitHub Actions) for multi-version Python testing plus lint/type checks
fix dependency detection mismatch by ensuring setup.py/metadata is discoverable and mirrored in requirements/dev requirements
expand tests beyond indicators into broker/order lifecycle and cerebro optimization edge cases
add integration tests for optional backends (IB/Oanda/pyfolio/pandas feeds) with graceful-skip markers
introduce static analysis/pre-commit (ruff/black/isort/mypy) and enforce style consistency
improve docs with a quickstart and architecture map for Cerebro/Strategy/Feed/Broker interactions
add API stability notes and deprecation policy for core extension points
reduce monolithic hotspots (cerebro.py/strategy.py/bbroker.py/store modules) via incremental refactors into smaller components
add structured logging hooks and clearer error messages around feed/broker connectivity failures
create benchmark/regression suite for run-loop and memory usage on large datasets
strengthen plugin layer tests for generated MCP endpoints (class instantiation
arg validation
failure modes)
add contract tests to verify MCP adapter import mode against real backtrader modules
pin and document optional dependency groups (plotting
live trading
analytics) for reproducible installs
add security and maintenance hygiene (dependabot
pinned minima
vulnerability scan)
document and test CLI behavior parity between btrun and tools/bt-run.py
add smoke tests using sample strategies/data to validate end-to-end execution
provide contributor guide updates (local setup
test matrix
optional services mocking)

success_factors: Workflow reached terminal status 'success' and executed all planned nodes (download, analysis, env, generate, run, review, finalize).
Robust fallback behavior: when git clone failed, zip fallback succeeded and produced a full repository snapshot (~367 files) for analysis and generation.
Low-intrusion import-based adapter strategy (feasibility 0.9, intrusiveness low) matched backtrader’s architecture well.
Generated MCP service started healthy over stdio and passed plugin-level health checks.
failure_reasons: Primary repository acquisition failed due to network/connectivity issue to github.com:443 (curl 28 timeout).
Telemetry and reporting inconsistencies: execution summary shows 0 files processed / 0 tools / 0 LOC, while detailed state shows substantial analysis and 16 endpoints.
DeepWiki integration failed, reducing enrichment quality and external contextual diagnostics.

node_performance.download_time: Dominant delay likely occurred in download due to 75s network timeout before fallback; clone failure recovered by zip import.
node_performance.analysis_time: Moderate; analysis succeeded on a large codebase and identified core modules/CLI/dependencies despite summary counters being inaccurate.
node_performance.generation_time: Efficient baseline generation (7 files) with import adapter and core endpoint exposure; minimal customization depth.
node_performance.test_time: Plugin runtime validation was fast and successful (healthy service), but original project tests were effectively not executed (reported passed=false with empty details).

resource_usage.memory_efficiency: Unknown from metrics (reported 0 MB). Practical efficiency appears acceptable given successful analysis of a medium-large repo.
resource_usage.cpu_efficiency: Unknown from metrics (reported 0%). No evidence of CPU saturation; elapsed time mainly attributable to network/retry behavior.
resource_usage.disk_usage: Low-to-moderate for generated artifacts; repository footprint moderate-to-large. Reported generated size=0 indicates measurement instrumentation issue.
